title: ayenia scabra
intro: Ayenia scabra, also known as the rough ayenia, is a plant species native to Central and South America, classified as a member of the Malpighiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ayenia scabra include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, and it has also been used to treat gastrointestinal issues and as an antiviral agent. Ayenia scabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
